apps.name: cst.exe
apps.desc: Cyber Slot Terminal — CMD shell with AI, TTS, Python & full Unicode/ASCII support.
apps.about: cst.exe (Cyber Slot Terminal) is a feature-rich CMD shell. Python launcher, CS-Ai, TTS, and full Unicode + ASCII input support.

apps.name: BingFuscatorCS V1
apps.desc: Batch file obfuscator — feed it a .bat and get a harder to read (UTF-16 LE) while preserving functionality version back.
apps.about: BingFuscatorCS V1 obfuscates Batch scripts using PowerShell. Output is functionally identical but harder to read while preserving functionality

apps.name: BingFuscatorCS V2
apps.desc: V2 of the Batch obfuscator — better UI, stronger obfuscation, more features.
apps.about: BingFuscatorCS V2 builds on V1 with improved menus, etc

apps.name: TerImageSharp
apps.desc: A Pixel-Perfect image renderer for Terminal Graphics in C#
apps.about: A Pixel-Perfect image renderer for Terminal Graphics in C#

codes.name: C# Bytebeat
codes.desc: Play bytebeat audio in C# using Windows API (only WinMM.dll, no NAudio or any packages) for sound output. Demonstrates procedural audio generation.

codes.name: Python Bytebeat
codes.desc: Play bytebeat audio in Python using PyAudio and NumPy. Demonstrates procedural audio generation.
codes.code:
import numpy as np
import pyaudio

def bytebeat(t):
    return (t&t>>8) & 0xFF

p = pyaudio.PyAudio()
stream = p.open(format=pyaudio.paUInt8, channels=1, rate=8000, output=True)

t = 0
while True:
    buffer = bytes([bytebeat(t + i) for i in range(1024)])
    stream.write(buffer)
    t += 1024

codes.name: Block Windows Terminal
codes.desc: Windows Terminal can't hijack your App. Open in the Default Terminal (Conhost).
